site.title: dreamdev — Game Programmer & Frontend Web Developer
site.description: Portfolio of dreamdev, game programmer and frontend web developer.

about.heading: About
bio: Hi! My name is Alonso and I'm a developer focused on game programming and frontend web development.
Two big areas drive me: video games and technology, and programming is the bridge that connects them perfectly.

Because of this, one of my goals is to learn as many programming languages as possible. In game dev, I love bringing characters to life, designing immersive environments, and building memorable experiences. But I don't stick to one environment; I'm also a cross-platform enthusiast who enjoys software creation and constantly learning new tools and frameworks.

As a professional, I'm highly focused. I truly value teamwork; I enjoy collaborating much more than working alone, driven by building something collectively where everyone adds value through their own contribution.
In my free time I play games; my favorite is osu!, a rhythm game, and I'm a fan of the Catppuccin color palette.
